manualAnalysis.title: Manual odds evaluation
manualAnalysis.subtitle: Build a manual matchup, enter the odds from your preferred bookmaker and compare them with the prevIA model.
manualAnalysis.lockedBody: This page was built for manual matchups with personalized odds reading and is available from Light onwards.
manualAnalysis.matchupPreviewEmpty: Choose home and away teams to build the matchup.
manualAnalysis.matchupHint: This analysis is built manually and does not depend on a match already listed in the product.
manualAnalysis.sameTeamWarning: Home and away teams must be different.
manualAnalysis.creditHint: Each new manual analysis costs 1 credit and is saved in your history.
manualAnalysis.genericError: Could not generate the analysis right now.
manualAnalysis.resultEmpty: Build a manual matchup, enter any odds you want and generate your analysis.
manualAnalysis.historyEmpty: You have not generated manual analyses yet.
manualAnalysis.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to generate this manual analysis? This will consume 1 credit.
manualAnalysis.confirmCreditHint: The analysis will be saved in your history for future consultation without a new charge.
manualAnalysis.subtitle: Build a fully manual matchup, enter your bookmaker odds and compare them with the prevIA model.
manualAnalysis.teamSearchPlaceholder: Type a team, country or league
manualAnalysis.matchupHint: This analysis is built manually and allows teams from different leagues/countries.
